project_type: Full-stack care home management app (CareVista) with React frontend and Express/TypeScript backend
build_system: npm for both; backend uses tsc, frontend uses vite + tsc
test_framework: No formal test framework - validation is via TypeScript compilation (tsc) and build checks
build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/jubilant-waddle/backend && npm run build && cd /projects/sandbox/jubilant-waddle/frontend && npm run build
test_command: cd /projects/sandbox/jubilant-waddle/backend && npx tsc --noEmit && cd /projects/sandbox/jubilant-waddle/frontend && npx tsc --noEmit
verification_instructions: 1. Run backend tsc --noEmit to check TypeScript compilation. 2. Run frontend tsc --noEmit to check TypeScript compilation. 3. Run npm run build in both directories.
setup_instructions: cd backend && npm install; cd frontend && npm install
environment_constraints: Open internet - npm packages can be installed. No running PostgreSQL/Redis so runtime testing not possible. Validation is via TypeScript compilation.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns: controllers in backend/src/controllers/, migrations numbered sequentially (next is 010), routes added to backend/src/routes/index.ts, frontend pages in frontend/src/pages/, hooks in frontend/src/hooks/index.ts, API services in frontend/src/services/api.ts, types in frontend/src/types/index.ts, routes in frontend/src/App.tsx with nav items in NAV_ALL array.
key_patterns: Backend: Express controllers export async functions (req, res, next), use req.user!.care_home_id for tenant isolation, query() for DB access. Frontend: pages are React components with inline styles, hooks use React Query (useQuery/useMutation), api.ts has grouped service objects, App.tsx has NAV_ALL array for sidebar nav with role-based visibility.
directory_structure: backend/src/controllers/ - API controllers; backend/src/routes/index.ts - all routes; backend/migrations/ - numbered SQL migrations; frontend/src/pages/ - page components; frontend/src/hooks/index.ts - React Query hooks; frontend/src/services/api.ts - axios API clients; frontend/src/types/index.ts - shared types; frontend/src/App.tsx - routing and nav
